pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs the agent to set the Name to 'Industrial Sensor Launch 2026'.
Task description explicitly instructs the agent to set the Type to 'Web'.
Task description explicitly instructs the agent to set the Status to 'Active'.
Task description explicitly instructs the agent to set the Budget to '15000'.
Task description explicitly instructs the agent to set the Expected Revenue to '75000'.
Task description explicitly provides these exact names and URLs for the three trackers.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly require the agent to create a 'Web' campaign named 'Industrial Sensor Launch 2026' with an 'Active' status, a budget of 15000.0, and expected revenue of 75000.0. Additionally, the agent must create three specific trackers: 'LinkedIn Promo' (https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/linkedin), 'Trade Show Kiosk' (https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/kiosk), and 'Partner Email' (https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/partner). Since this is a synthetic data entry task, all expected values map directly to the task prompt without relying on external datasets.
